panels.title: Messages received per minute, by stream

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ingested_at) AS time, count() AS metrics FROM sink.metrics_raw WHERE ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(ingested_at) AS time, count() AS traces FROM sink.traces_raw WHERE ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(ingested_at) AS time, count() AS logs FROM sink.logs_raw WHERE ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT ingested_at, raw FROM sink.metrics_raw ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT ingested_at, raw FROM sink.traces_raw ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT ingested_at, raw FROM sink.logs_raw ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 20
